endpoints.name: GET /{scope}/providers/Microsoft.Blueprint/blueprintAssignments/{assignmentName}/assignmentOperations
endpoints.description: List operations for given blueprint assignment within a subscription.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ASSIGNMENTNAME}} with a real assignmentname. Replace {{SCOPE}} with a real scope.

endpoints.name: GET /{scope}/providers/Microsoft.Blueprint/blueprintAssignments/{assignmentName}/assignmentOperations/{assignmentOperationName}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ASSIGNMENTNAME}} with a real assignmentname. Replace {{SCOPE}} with a real scope. Replace {{ASSIGNMENTOPERATIONNAME}} with a real assignmentoperationname.
